class.name: MaterialManager
class.brief_description: Loads and caches MaSzyna materials and DDS textures.
class.description: [MaterialManager] is an engine singleton used by the E3D runtime to resolve MaSzyna [code].mat[/code] definitions and related DDS textures into [StandardMaterial3D] resources. It also exposes direct texture loading and respects the [code]e3d/use_alpha_transparency[/code] user setting when resolving transparency.

method.name: clear_cache
method.description: Clears the cached generated materials and refreshes settings-dependent behavior.

method.name: get_material
method.description: Returns a generated [StandardMaterial3D] for the requested MaSzyna material path.

method.name: get_texture
method.description: Loads a DDS texture using the same path resolution rules as material loading.
